choices: I set up a recorder in my bedroom, Family room, bathroom
I ask around to everyone I know
I try to pry the answer out of my brothers
1.content:
I was told recently by an email, one without a sender or IP address, I actually thought it was just spam mail, but when I saw my name as Geo in the first sentence, I had a feeling that it was true.

As I read the email, I learned of the lost time that I have been experiencing over the last week, sometimes almost all day long, and I have had a odd funny taste in my mouth sometimes when I come to and find out where I am.

Once done reading the long email, I realized that I have been hypnotized, doing god knows what , over and over again , but WHO and WHY is this happening ???

I had to try and find out who implanted this in my mind, and figure out how to break it.

My first thought was one of my brothers, but then I thought, it could literally be ANYONE .........
1.title: Finding Out

choices: I caught someone on one of the camera's .
I woke up from one of my blackouts and saw on my camera, who did this to me.
The camera's caught nothing to suggest anyone here.
My camera's started vanishing one by one.
11.content:
I had an idea on how to catch the culprit in the act, at least if it was someone here at home.

I ended up stealing my fathers credit card before he left on a business trip and proceeded to buy five different small camera's , I placed four of them in the house, the first one I placed in my bedroom, at the angle where it would show anyone who came through my door and had the other end of the camera's viewing field that crossed over to my bed, just in case someone came to me while I was sleeping.

The second camera was placed in the kitchen, knowing everyone goes in the kitchen at some point and thought maybe I could see someone who might trick me by bringing me some food or drink that might make me sleepy or just outright drug me to where I could not remember who it was that was controlling me by saying those terrible two words.

The third camera had been placed in the family room where everyone visits from time to time, with hopes that the person responsible for this mess might gloat to themselves about what they were going to do to me next .or .if the person might have another person helping them ( I made sure to get camera's with sound as well as video).

The fourth camera was set up in the corner of the bathroom, everyone goes there ... and my hopes were to hear someone talking to themselves about what their plans were for me next.

The fifth and last camera was the smallest one that I bought and I had attached it to my short sleeve button down shirt, I attached it under the right side collar, hoping that if someone successfully did slip by the other camera's that at least I would have proof when I could finally return back to myself and finally catch the person who is using me over and over, for who knows what .........
11.title: I set up a recorder in my bedroom, Family room,...

choices: I’m not dressing up and trying to get in his pants, so probably not him
Syd gives me a hint of who it is
Syd visits me that night in my sleep
13.content:
Getting desperate for any kind of answer, I decided to try and pry some answers out of one of my brothers.
As I walked into my brothers room, I saw my youngest brother Syd laying on his bed on his phone, I asked him “ hey Syd, where is your brother Chad at ?”
Syd just looked at me and shrugged his shoulders, I sat down beside him and grabbed his phone quickly and saw that he was looking at sissy porn, “HEY GIVE THAT Back Geo” I looked at him and said “ aren’t you a little young to be looking at porn, especially sissy gurl porn?”

Being embarrassed he just said “ what do you want Geo and grabbed his phone back out of my hands.
I want to know who keeps hypnotizing me, is it YOU ?”

Syd just laughed and said “ if it was me Geo, you would be dressing up as a sissy gurl right now and trying to get in my pants”.

I look at Syd and think ....
13.title: I try to pry the answer out of my brothers

info.brief_description: Unknown to myself, someone Hypnotized me using the words "Gold Fish "
info.description:
I am George Henry, my Family and friends call me Geo, and I will find out soon that when I hear the words "Gold Fish " in combination, I become completely blank and can be made to do anything, luckily I am only under for a short time around five hours or so, each time it happens.

Help me find out WHO had Hypnotized me and how to break out of this curse, I have two younger brothers that I live with, my youngest brother is Syd and my middle brother is Chad, my mother Holly and father Chris and friends and cousins that stop by all the time.

It could actually be anyone who has done this to me ... doctor, therapist, paperboy, family member, friend, teacher, Principal, stranger ...ect



Please No growing, shrinking no less than 3 ft. tall and is temporary, No vore , toilet related things.
This is mainly an all Male story, females can interact but very shortly, shemales, fem boi's, and Traps are welcome.

My friends and family are all smaller in build, kind of nerdy and want me to do naughty things when I am Under !

Keep it more on the sexy side please .........
info.pretty_title: At The Mercy Of The Word's "Gold Fish"
